summary: Frontend testing of PhotographerSessionsManager split workflow (Session Setup vs Go Live). All 9 requested features verified working correctly. The Edit button opens Settings Modal with collapsible sections, Save Settings closes modal with toast confirmation, Go Live button triggers location permission then opens Go Live Modal with spot selection and location verification (0.2 miles requirement), Next: Add Conditions button properly disabled until spot selected and location verified/confirmed, pricing mode toggle (Standard Rates vs Promotional) works correctly, and savings badge displays when promotional rate is lower than high-res rate.
critical_code_review_comments: PhotographerSessionsManager.js properly implements separated workflows: showSettingsModal for rates/pricing and showGoLiveModal for location selection
Location verification logic correctly calculates distance using Haversine formula and enforces 0.2 mile requirement
Manual location confirmation option provides good UX fallback when GPS is inaccurate
Collapsible sections in Settings Modal improve UX by reducing visual clutter
Pricing mode toggle (tiered vs promotional) with savings badge provides clear value proposition to photographers
data-testid attributes properly set: go-live-btn, go-live-spot-select, go-live-next-btn, save-settings-btn
context_for_next_testing_agent: PhotographerSessionsManager split workflow fully tested. Key flows: 1) Edit button -> Settings Modal (rates/pricing with collapsible sections), 2) Go Live button -> location permission -> Go Live Modal (spot selection + location verification) -> Conditions Modal. Geolocation mocking required for testing Go Live flow in headless browser.

edit_button_opens_settings_modal.description: Edit button in Session Setup card opens Settings Modal with title 'Session Rates & Settings'

settings_modal_collapsible_sections.description: Settings Modal has 3 collapsible sections: Session Buy-in (expanded by default), Photo Pricing, Session Settings

save_settings_button.description: Save Settings button closes modal and shows 'Session rates saved locally' toast

go_live_button_opens_modal.description: Go Live button first requests location permission, then opens Go Live Modal with title 'Go Live - Select Location'

go_live_spot_selection.description: Go Live Modal shows spot selection dropdown with data-testid='go-live-spot-select'

location_verification.description: After spot selection, shows location verification: 'Not at the spot yet' warning with distance (e.g., '2214.07 miles away'), 'GPS not accurate?' manual confirm option

next_button_disabled_logic.description: Next: Add Conditions button (data-testid='go-live-next-btn') is disabled until spot is selected AND location is verified (within 0.2 miles) OR manually confirmed

pricing_mode_toggle.description: Photo Pricing section has toggle between 'Standard Rates' (Web/Standard/High tiers) and 'Promotional' (single flat rate)

savings_badge.description: When Promotional mode active and promo rate ($5) < high-res rate ($10), shows 'Promo Active: Surfers save $5/photo' badge with strikethrough pricing

conditions_modal.description: After clicking Next: Add Conditions, Conditions Check modal opens with media upload options (Take Photo, Record Video, Upload from gallery), Spot Notes field, and disabled 'Confirm & Go Live' button until media is added
